title: Badge/角標 Sprite 套件（9 檔）
notes: completed 2026-03-31. 9 個 PNG 已建立於 `badge/`：`badge_rarity_N/R/SR/SSR/UR/LR.png`、`badge_lv.png`、`badge_qty.png`、`badge_notification.png`。SHA256 分別為 N=96AA8008、R=5A24C4E0、SR=BB909D36、SSR=37E13324、UR=C6756C3A、LR=8FB2C9F8、lv=AC882E2C、qty=15505563、notification=7879E309；稀有度 badge 為 40x22 左直右圓標籤，通知 badge 為 28x28 紅色圓形。

title: Gold CTA 框體 Sprite (frame/fill/bg)
notes: completed 2026-03-31. `gold_cta/frame.png` | B753A6D6E88F3E33A7400037A93CDA34ED5882CAD26916BAFAE9282C43E5A4A9 | 2189B（80x80，粗金邊框 + 外 glow + 角三角裝飾，border [28,28,28,28]）；`fill.png` | 727F9BFA... | 290B（64x64）；`bg.png` | 726D0E08... | 733B（64x64）。對應 §2.4 Gold CTA 框體。

title: §9.6 Skin 契約自動驗證腳本
notes: completed 2026-03-31. 建立 `tools_node/validate-skin-contracts.js`，規則包含 R1 fill alpha DD~F0、R2 bleed slot 必填、R3 深底文字 outlineWidth>=1、R4 淺底文字 outlineWidth=0、R5 dark-metal border>=20。首次掃描結果為 24 PASS / 5 FAIL，通過率 82.8%，失敗集中在 `general-detail-default.json` 缺 5 個 bleed slot。

title: §3.3 Frame Sprite 金色邊框像素掃描腳本
description: 建立 `tools/validate-frame-sprites.ps1`，對 10 個 frame/button sprite 做金色 / 暖銅色邊框像素掃描；首次執行 10/10 PASS。
notes: completed 2026-03-31. §9.6 驗證腳本套件最後一塊缺口已補齊，掃描結果為 dark_metal:735px、parchment:101px、gold_cta:738px、progress_bar:398px、tab:1057px、diamond_tab:50px、circle_icon:212px、nav_ink:2045px、equipment:5217px、commerce:3877px，全部 PASS，§9.6 可執行規則覆蓋率達 100%。

details: Prepare and execute lobby-main nav.ink plus shadow screenshot comparison package against reference screenshots.
notes: 2026-03-31 opened Agent2 Phase D QA card and prepared artifacts/ui-qa/UI-1-0014/. UI-2-0018 is now complete: canonical preview route is assets/scenes/LoadingScene.scene -> LoadingScene.ts root component -> previewMode=true -> previewTarget=LobbyMain. 2026-03-31 Agent2 resumed D-1 after confirming `http://localhost:7456` is reachable again, but autonomous capture is still blocked because the repo lacks a stable, reproducible headless preview screenshot pipeline. Follow-up tooling card UI-2-0023 was opened for Agent1.

details: Prepare multi-screen paper.utility QA package for shop-main and gacha, focusing on cross-screen consistency.
notes: 2026-03-31 opened Agent2 Phase D QA card. UI-2-0018 is complete and preview entry now exists via LoadingScene.ts + UIScreenPreviewHost.ts. UI-2-0019 formally re-scoped D-2 to common-parchment / light-surface carrier consistency, and UI-2-0020 wired shared QA anchors into shop-main and gacha. 2026-03-31 Agent2 captured ShopMain successfully via headless preview. Agent1 then completed UI-2-0025 by routing Gacha preview through `gacha-main-screen` + `gacha-preview-main`, so Agent2 can now capture both ShopMain and Gacha and proceed to formal D-2 comparison notes.

details: Prepare duel-challenge mixed-family QA package to confirm reject equals paper.utility and accept equals equipment.primary.
notes: 2026-03-31 opened Agent2 Phase D QA card. UI-2-0018 is now complete: canonical preview route is assets/scenes/LoadingScene.scene -> LoadingScene.ts root component -> previewMode=true -> previewTarget=DuelChallenge. 2026-03-31 Agent2 verified the new headless capture pipeline can successfully export DuelChallenge.png, so D-3 can now proceed with formal comparison notes instead of relying on legacy DuelChallengePanel.ts buildUI().

title: Fix general-detail-default 5 missing bleed slots
description: validate-skin-contracts.js found 5 R2 FAILs in general-detail-default.json: detail.summary.card/tab.idle/tab.active/tree.node/action all missing bleed slots.
notes: 2026-03-31 fixed five missing bleed slots in general-detail-default.json, then reran node tools_node/validate-skin-contracts.js and node tools_node/run-acceptance.js successfully. Contract validation returned 29/29 PASS.

title: Add screen-driven preview hosts for D-stage QA screens
description: Provide real UISpecLoader.loadFullScreen(...) entry points for lobby-main, shop-main, gacha, and duel-challenge so Agent2 can capture trustworthy D-1~D-3 screenshots.
notes: 2026-03-31 completed. Added assets/scripts/ui/components/UIScreenPreviewHost.ts and extended assets/scripts/ui/scenes/LoadingScene.ts with previewMode + previewTarget enum. Canonical preview route for Agent2 is assets/scenes/LoadingScene.scene -> LoadingScene.ts root component -> previewMode=true -> previewTarget={LobbyMain,ShopMain,Gacha,DuelChallenge}. Project now has explicit loadFullScreen('lobby-main-screen'|'shop-main-screen'|'gacha-screen'|'duel-challenge-screen') entry points and D-1~D-3 are unblocked.

title: Align D-2 target family between docs and shop/gacha skins
description: Reconcile the D-2 QA target (paper.utility) with the actual shop-main / gacha skin implementations, which currently point to commerce/color and common-parchment patterns.
notes: 2026-03-31 completed. D-2 is formally re-scoped from paper.utility button consistency to common-parchment / light-surface carrier consistency. Rationale: paper.utility remains valid for duel-challenge utility actions, but current shop-main-default and gacha-default do not share that button family. Follow-up implementation task UI-2-0020 was opened to wire a real shared light-surface carrier into shop-main and gacha before Agent2 runs D-2 QA.

title: Wire shared light-surface carriers into shop-main and gacha
description: Expose a real common-parchment/light-surface carrier in shop-main and gacha so D-2 can evaluate cross-screen surface consistency instead of placeholder color blocks.
notes: shop-main-default.json v5: added shop.content.carrier QA anchor slot. gacha-default.json v3: added gacha.pity.carrier.bg/frame slots. gacha-main.json v2: PityInfoBar now has skinSlot=gacha.pity.carrier.bg. D-2 unblocked. acceptance all green.

title: Fix PreviewInEditor SpriteFrame resource index drift
description: Investigate and fix PreviewInEditor failures where existing SpriteFrame assets under assets/resources/sprites/ui_families/* cannot be resolved from the resources bundle.
notes: 2026-03-31 Agent2 opened this card after PreviewInEditor reported `Bundle resources doesn't contain .../spriteFrame` for shadow_01, metal_noise_256, equipment/btn_primary_normal, and multiple general_detail sprites. File audit confirmed the PNG and .meta files already exist under assets/resources/sprites/ui_families/..., so this is currently treated as an Agent1-side resource index / path normalization / editor refresh contract issue rather than a missing-art asset task. 2026-03-31 Agent1 completed the fix by normalizing resource paths in ResourceManager, retrying SpriteFrame candidates before Texture2D fallback, releasing single SpriteFrame cache keys correctly, adding tools_node/validate-representative-spriteframe-assets.js into acceptance, and running asset-db refresh successfully.

title: Upgrade general-list from placeholder table to framed lobby skin
description: Replace the remaining color-rect/placeholder presentation in general-list with proper 9-slice background and framed header/list/row styling using existing lobby/common panel families.
notes: general-list-default.json v5: `header.bg -> dark_metal/frame` 9-slice；`list.bg -> parchment/bg` 9-slice（opacity=0.6）；`row.bg -> dark_metal/bg` 9-slice；header label 色彩改為 `#D4AF37` 金色。acceptance 全綠。

title: Provide reproducible headless preview capture for D-stage QA
description: Add a stable CLI/headless capture workflow for LoadingScene.previewTarget-based screen QA so Agent2 can generate D-1~D-3 artifacts without manual Inspector interaction.
notes: 2026-03-31 Agent1 hardened the capture pipeline: LoadingScene now supports query/localStorage preview injection and publishes __UI_CAPTURE_STATE__ (loading/ready/error); tools_node/capture-ui-screens.js is now a puppeteer-core headless CLI, auto-injects LoadingScene.scene uuid, writes debug screenshot/state artifacts on failure, triggers asset-db refresh before capture, retries refreshable preview failures, and uses domcontentloaded instead of networkidle2 for the Cocos Editor preview page. 2026-03-31 Agent2 confirmed reproducible screenshot export for LobbyMain, ShopMain, DuelChallenge, and Gacha under artifacts/ui-qa/UI-2-0023/. The remaining Gacha compatibility work was completed under UI-2-0025, so UI-2-0023 is now fully closed as tooling-complete.

title: Align gacha-screen with UIScreenPreviewHost loadFullScreen contract
description: Refactor assets/resources/ui-spec/screens/gacha-screen.json from the legacy multi-screen schema to the single-screen loadFullScreen contract expected by UIScreenPreviewHost and LoadingScene.previewTarget=Gacha.
notes: 2026-03-31 Agent2 validated the headless capture pipeline by exporting LobbyMain, ShopMain, and DuelChallenge. Agent1 then finished the Gacha preview compatibility path by adding `assets/resources/ui-spec/layouts/gacha-preview-main.json`, pointing `gacha-main-screen.json` to that preview-safe layout, and aligning `LoadingScene.previewTarget=Gacha` plus `tools_node/capture-ui-screens.js` to use `gacha-main-screen` as the canonical preview contract. `node tools_node/capture-ui-screens.js --target Gacha` now succeeds and exports `artifacts/ui-qa/UI-2-0023/Gacha.png`.

title: BattleScene UI 佈局確認：Widget / Anchor / Layout Contract
description: 確認 BattleScene 各層 UI 佈局是否正確對應當前 layout JSON 契約，包括 HUD 各節點的 Widget/Anchor 設定是否能正確縮放、排除現有 label warn，確保 layouts + screens 中的 widget 設定完整，safeArea 邊距與 z-order 無衝突，並在 1920x1080 實機解析度下無裂版。
notes: 2026-04-01 | 狀態: in-progress | 驗證: 使用 cocos-screenshot 確認畫面佈局 | 變更: BattleScene 佈局框架確認，UI-2-0046 schema 回寫完成 | 阻塞: 待 UI-2-0046 完成後做最終全面確認
acceptanceCriteria: 執行 Cocos refresh，確認資源與 layout 正確載入。
HUD 所有元件正確顯示，在 1920x1080 下無明顯錯位。
在 16:9 / 19.5:9 比例下，safeArea 邊距正確。
temp/logs/project.log 掃描無 layout 相關 warn / error。

title: Split UIPreviewBuilder into helper modules to reduce encoding and merge risk
description: Break UIPreviewBuilder into smaller orchestration/text/diagnostics/layout/style modules after the current encoding repair stabilizes, without changing runtime behavior.
notes: 2026-03-31 Phase 1 completed: (1) Created UIPreviewDiagnostics.ts with 13 diagnostic methods centralizing all console calls; (2) Created UIPreviewTextCatalog.ts centralizing Chinese strings and JSDoc; (3) Updated UIPreviewBuilder.ts to route all console.log/warn/error through UIPreviewDiagnostics; (4) Verified zero direct console calls remain in UIPreviewBuilder.ts; (5) All changes are pure refactoring, runtime behavior unchanged. Next phase: Layout & Style helper extraction.

title: 修正 BattleScene Icon 品質差異（v2）
